case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. CHRISTIAN LANCASTER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395 (B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
